items.name_en: Market Best Version (Original Quality) Authentic Pattern
items.name_cn:
Market Best Version (Original Quality) Authentic Pattern
【Guaranteed Imported Top Grain Leather, No Split Leather, No Microfiber】
Long Zip Wallet
Beige and Black Oblique Print
Number: 2ESBC252YSE_H05E
This long zip wallet is understated yet elegant. Crafted from beige and black Oblique print fabric with a black smooth leather interior. The center zip pocket holds coins, while the double cash compartment and 12 card slots provide ample storage. Elegant and spacious, it is an ideal daily companion.
Main: Cotton, Tech Fabric
Lining: Leather, Tech Fabric
Zip Main Compartment
12 Card Slots
Internal Zip Pocket
Double Cash Compartment
2 Pockets with Triangle Linings
Front with Metal-Plated Copper Alloy Dior Logo
Interior with Dior Embossed Logo
Includes Dust Bag
Size: 19.8 x 11 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits Credit Cards

items.name_cn:
Matte Gold Leaf Clasp
Niki_baby
Unisex casual academic shoulder and crossbody bag
Suede paired with lightweight soft calfskin lining. Low-key luxury and versatile. The commuter silhouette works for both casual and chic styles. The iconic logo design is minimalist. The strap works for both shoulder and crossbody to easily create a look.
If you like it, you can definitely get it. A timeless style.
Style No.: 633151-1
Size: 22×16.5×12cm

items.name_cn:
MCM Aren ESSENTIAL
Mini#Boston Pillow Bag
Top Version 💰 Exclusive® Classic Cognac
Can be shoulder, crossbody, or hand-held. Official website synchronized model.
This mini Boston bag offers a fresh interpretation of the classic style, crafted from classic Visetos material, paying tribute to MCM's roots in travel. Its silhouette evokes a weekend travel bag, featuring clean lines and a convenient extended zipper. The exquisite craftsmanship features a hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted top handle.
Model: MWBAASE03CO001
Size: 18*8*9.5cm
Strap: 102-118cm
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾

items.name_cn:
MCM Aren Visetos
New mini patchwork basket 👜
Exclusive® Classic Cognac
This mini Aren top-zip shopper is the latest design for Spring/Summer 2024, featuring eye-catching Spanish calfskin trim outlining the upper part of the bag. This small daily bag is lined with soft eco-friendly cotton, offering ample space for small essentials and valuables. A soft leather handle provides a comfortable hand-carry experience, while the included leather crossbody strap allows for an elegant hands-free function.
Model: MWPDSTA01CO001
Size: 21.5*9.5*19cm
Strap: 100-116cm
Handle: Drop 11cm
Color: Cognac/Brown🏾

Black Mini#Boston Bag
New

items.name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Medium Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
Exclusive®️ Classic Black
Two classic looks are fused into one daily essential. This medium-sized Liz shopping bag is made of Visetos and Nappa leather, and can be used on both sides, with the turned-out lining revealing the Cubic classic pattern. Additionally, the lightweight silhouette can be expanded or contracted via a leather drawstring. The included detachable zippered clutch enriches the functionality of this shopping bag and can be removed to serve as a wallet for short trips.
Size: 36*17*28cm
Handle Drop: 24cm
Features: Double-sided / Two-in-one
Color: Elegant Black / Black ◼️

items.name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Mini Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
Exclusive®️Classic Black
Classic MCM minimalism is presented through a modern minimalist design. This mini shopping bag features a scaled-down version of the iconic Liz silhouette while retaining its beloved functionality. The inclusion of an independent pouch and double-sided cotton canvas fabric makes this compact carryall even more charming.
Model: MWPDALRO1CO001
Size: 28*11*20cm
Handle Drop: 18cm
Features: Double-sided/Bag-in-Bag
Color: Elegant Black/Black◼️
